injection.text: As the algorithm processes each span in order, it compares the current span to the last non-overlapping span that was added to the list. If the current span overlaps with the last non-overlapping span, the algorithm updates the end value of the last non-overlapping span to be the maximum of its current end value and the end value of the current span. This ensures that the resulting non-overlapping spans are maximal, since each non-overlapping span is extended as far as possible to the right without overlapping with any other span. 1.
